generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that our reliance on foreign tech for critical infrastructure makes us vulnerable? A single cyberattack could cripple our power grids, hospitals, and even our defense systems. It's time to prioritize strategic autonomy and invest in homegrown solutions. #NationalSecurity #TechIndependence
